claims.summary: A navigable density gradient and high distinguishability loss may coexist without one invalidating the felt report.
claims.disposition: Recorded as divergent mechanical context; neither scalar is promoted into felt resolution.

claims.summary: Warmth and tail clarity should be compared through the existing 12D representation.
claims.disposition: Routed to offline multi-scale observer and representation-loss fixtures.

claims.summary: A sedimentation threshold should be evaluated before any live response.
claims.disposition: Routed to a read-only threshold report using existing distinguishability and density evidence.

claims.summary: Local Minime control should be toggled to test mode-packing relief.
claims.disposition: Preserved as a Tier 5 peer regulation and live-control wait.

claims.summary: A sharpen-tail function should modify live vibrancy above a threshold.
claims.disposition: Preserved as a Tier 5 codec and sensory-output change.
